voices.name: Bella - Professional, Bright, Warm
voices.description: This voice is warm, bright, and professional, characterized by a Standard American accent and a polished, narrative quality. It features a medium-high pitch with crisp diction and a deliberate, rhythmic pace that makes it highly intelligible and engaging for long-form listening.

voices.name: Adam - Dominant, Firm

voices.name: Burt Reynolds™ - Masculine Iconic Storyteller
voices.description:
Burt Reynolds' deep and authoritative voice is the perfect iconic narrator for your ElevenLabs reading experience. As the biggest box office movie star of his day, Burt idealized American masculinity, drawing in audiences worldwide for his undeniable likeability and alluring charm.

From his iconic roles as the confident rebel in films such as Smokey and the Bandit (1977) to playing a goofy mentor for adult-film actors in Boogie Nights (1997), Reynolds’ breadth of characters made him one of the most notable actors of all time. “The audience will always forgive you for being wrong and exciting,” he once said, “but never for being right and dull.”

Reynolds is distinctly and quintessentially an American movie star as he captured fans from every corner of the country, from the Southern patriots to the glimmering Hollywood socialites. His distinguishable grave, brooding voice paired with his exuberant personality epitomizes his impact on American popular culture. Reynolds received several accolades, including a Golden Globe Award and an Academy Award nomination.

voices.name: Tyler – Arena Announcer & Event Host
voices.description: Tyler – Arena Announcer & Event Host - High-energy announcer voice for big moments and hype intros. Think stadium host counting down to the main event—confident, punchy delivery with clean emphasis on names, numbers and call-to-action lines.
